title: oberonia insularis var. rotunda
intro: Oberonia insularis var. rotunda, also known as the Rotund-leaved Oberonia, is a rare and endemic orchid species found in the Philippines. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oberonia insularis var. rotunda include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against bacterial and fungal infections. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, or it can be processed into a topical cream or ointment for direct application to affected areas.
